title: Get Asset Type
content:
# Get Asset Type

Retrieves the parameters of an Asset Type.

## Endpoint

`GET /assets/types/{asset_type_name}/get`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.asset.getAssetType()
print(response)

parameters.name: asset_type_name
parameters.description: Asset Type key `name` to get. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

created.description: UTC time when the Asset Type was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

name.description: Unique identifier `name` for the Asset Type. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

title.description: Display name (`title`) of the Asset Type.

updated.description: UTC time when any Asset Type keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
